<English>: The T-55S Samovar was an Israeli prototype upgrade of the ש 5 ןריט featuring a new 8V71T engine, XTG-411-4 transmission, the Matador fire control system, a 2-plane stabilizer, and several more upgrades.

It is not known exactly how many 51-מ ןמרש tanks were built on the M4A3 hull, but there were at least six. They bore the hull numbers 812181-צ, 814561-צ, 814794-צ, 814795-צ, 814797-צ, and 814798-צ. There was also a possible seventh that may or may not have been 814798-צ.
